summary: OVERVALUED — Trad Base −69.5% / AI-Prem Base −54.2% · cap-AMBER
stageOverrideRationale: Default would be High Growth; user override to Young Growth recognizes 130% YoY revenue growth is 3-4x above High Growth band; margin profile is just-emerging; aligns with AI-tailwind narrative framing

aiPremium.rationale: 1.5x peer 75th percentile; reflects AI-data-center / clean-power thesis premium

multiples.peerNote: OKLO excluded from quantitative derivation (pre-revenue, $0 TTM rev); retained as qualitative AI-nuclear thesis premium reference

growthAssumptions.note: Y1 cases anchored to mgmt FY26 guidance $3.4B-$3.8B (mid $3.6B) released April 28, 2026; Y2 cases reflect Oracle 2.8GW MOU ramp + Brookfield $5B project finance enablement

currentImpliedMultiples.note: Market is paying 18.6x EV/FY27-base-revenue, well above 1.5x peer 75th premium of 15.75x

capitalStructureFlags: Customer concentration: SK ecoplant 55% of Q3 2025 revenue (related party) — RED flag
Oracle warrant $261.3M fair value granted April 9 2026 — contra-revenue drag as warrants vest with deliveries
Diluted share count +39% YoY (Q1 26 wtd avg vs Q1 25) driven by convertibles if-converted method + stock awards
Mitigants: net debt ~zero; convertibles 0% coupon (3.0% on 2029 tranche); no near-term refi wall; Brookfield $5B non-recourse project finance
Positive Q1 2026 operating cash flow $73.6M reverses prior quarters of negative OCF

runUpContext.note: Stock has run +1,460% in the past 12 months; sits at top of historic range; pricing 5+ years of compound growth + sustained premium multiples

verdictCaveats: Both Traditional and AI-Premium frameworks produce OVERVALUED results
Even AI-Premium Bull case ($271.55) is below current price ($290.52)
Capital structure AMBER due to SK ecoplant 55% concentration
Standard framework cannot price the momentum/narrative premium that the market is currently assigning

fcfRealismCheck.deferralReason: Heavy capex/working capital build through FY25 (cash flow from operations was -$304M YTD through Q3 25; Q1 26 swung positive to +$73.6M). 5Y DCF would require assumption stack on Oracle ramp pace + AI capex sustainability that the dual-scenario framework already captures via Y2 case range.

sources.10Q_Q3_2025: used for SK ecoplant 55% concentration disclosure

notes: Single-segment per BE 10-Q disclosure routes to Consolidated mode (not SOTP). Lifecycle override to Young Growth (EV/Revenue primary) was deliberate user choice — using High Growth (EV/Gross Profit) would produce even more conservative fair values given BE's 30% GM. Dual-scenario framework explicitly handles the disconnect between traditional industrial peer multiples and current market pricing. Market is paying 18.6x EV/FY27-base-revenue, which exceeds even the AI-Premium framework's 15.75x bull multiple. To justify current price, one of three things must be true: (1) FY27 revenue exceeds bull case ($6.8B), implying $8B+ actual; (2) multiples expand further into 20x+ territory; (3) market is pricing FY28-29 revenue today rather than FY27. None impossible, all extraordinary.
